last_fix.description: strategies_include/strategies_exclude condition types added to GraduatedRule.matches() + strategies_active parameter to evaluate_signal(). Updated ensemble.py (2 sites) and signal_pipeline.py call sites. 5 BB rules written to LLM engine at gate=20% probe: eth_sell_bb_golden_v1 (+8), btc_buy_bb_golden_v1 (+8), sol_buy_bb_golden_v1 (+8), hype_sell_bb_block_v1 (-15), bb_mtq_antipattern_v1 (-10).
last_fix.root_cause_correction: Prior 6 runs said 'strategy condition not supported in schema'. WRONG. Engine supports strategy conditions. Real issue: ensemble.strategy='ensemble', individual names in metadata['strategies_agree']. Fix adds list-matching via strategies_include.
last_fix.outcome_tracking: PENDING_RESTART — verify BB rules fire on bollinger_squeeze signals. Graduate gate 20%→50% at n>=20 obs, WR>=0.62.

new_findings_this_run.detail: tod_evening_edge_v1 and tod_afternoon_edge_v1 were in runtime engine in wrong format. Engine parsed them as rule_id='?' adj=0.0 — no boost would ever fire. Root cause: last run wrote documentation-format dict instead of GraduatedRule dataclass fields.

new_findings_this_run.detail: btc_trend_long_counter_v1 was tracked as ACTIVE in auto_fix_state since 2026-05-20T02:11 but was absent from graduated_rules.json. The fix was logged but the file write step was missing — possibly because the prior run only wrote to auto_fix_state and did not append to graduated_rules.json. Fixed this run. Now 14 rules in graduated_rules.json.
new_findings_this_run.action: FIXED — rule written to graduated_rules.json. Verified via engine simulation.

new_findings_this_run.detail: tod_morning_edge_v1 was tracked in bot/feedback/graduated_rules.json (A/B_ACTIVE gate=50%) but completely absent from LLM engine bot/data/llm/graduated_rules.json. This is the BEST TOD window (74% WR) and opens in 6.9h (Window 13 = 06:00-12:00 UTC May 22). Without this rule, LLM confidence engine gives no signal boost to morning trades. Pattern: third consecutive run discovering a missing rule in graduated_rules.json. Root cause: two separate graduated_rules.json files (feedback/ vs llm/) with inconsistent sync.
new_findings_this_run.action: FIXED — tod_morning_edge_v1 added to LLM engine. 15 rules now active. TOD stack complete. Monitor: first trade in 06:00-12:00 UTC window post-restart should show +5pts.

new_findings_this_run.detail: BB_SCHEMA_UNLOCK: 6 prior runs (since May 22 session start) blocked BB rules with diagnosis 'strategy condition type not supported in LLM rule schema'. This was WRONG. GraduatedRule.matches() DID support strategy condition (single-value). Real blocker: ensemble always emits strategy='ensemble'; individual strategy names live in metadata['strategies_agree']. Required strategies_include list-matching condition type. Fix: added strategies_include/strategies_exclude to GraduatedRule.matches(), strategies_active param to evaluate_signal(), updated 3 call sites, wrote 5 BB rules to LLM engine.
new_findings_this_run.action: FIXED — code changes applied, 5 rules written at gate=20% probe. Monitor at restart.
